title: Cynorkis simplex
intro: Cynorkis simplex, a species of orchid, is a flowering plant known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. The health benefits of Cynorkis simplex include its potential to treat various infections and diseases due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Cynorkis simplex is traditionally used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory infections and skin conditions.
taxonomy: Cynorkis simplex is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which comprises approximately 30,000 species of orchids. Within the Orchidaceae family, Cynorkis simplex is classified under the subfamily Orchidoideae. This subfamily is further divided into several tribes, with Cynorkis simplex being part of the tribe Orchideae. The tribe Orchideae is a large and diverse group of orchids with approximately 1,000 species.
